The '''''SpaceBantha''-class freighter''' was a boxy cargo [[Starship/Legends|ship]] built by [[Damorian Manufacturing Corporation/Legends|Damorian Manufacturing Corporation]]. It was used in the years after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''
